### シート: WorkCenterCountConstraints

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | MasterColumn |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WorkCenterName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | WorkCenters | Yes | [NEO] |  |  | ALL |  | The Work Center(s) for which we are counting openings. Groups are supported. | [NaN] | [] | WorkCenterName |
| WorkCenterNameGroupBehavior | [Enumerate, Aggregate] |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | Aggregate |  | If Work Center Name is a Group, use this field to specify the Group's behavior. If Enumerate is selected, an instance of this constraint will be created for each member of the Group. If Aggregate is selected, the flow in the constraint will be summed over the members of the Group. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| FacilityName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Facilities | Yes | [NEO] |  |  | ALL |  | The Facility or Facilities at which we are counting openings. Groups are supported. | [NaN] | [] | FacilityName |
| FacilityNameGroupBehavior | [Enumerate, Aggregate] |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | Aggregate |  | If Facility Name is a Group, use this field to specify the Group's behavior. If Enumerate is selected, an instance of this constraint will be created for each member of the Group. If Aggregate is selected, the flow in the constraint will be summed over the members of the Group. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| PeriodName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Periods | Yes | [NEO] |  |  | ALL |  | The Period(s) in which we are counting open Work Centers. Groups are supported. | [NaN] | [] | PeriodName |
| PeriodGroupNameBehavior | [Enumerate, Aggregate] |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | Aggregate |  | If Period Name is a Group, use this field to specify the Group's behavior. If Enumerate is selected, an instance of this constraint will be created for each member of the Group. If Aggregate is selected, the flow in the constraint will be summed over the members of the Group. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| ConstraintType | [Min, Max, Fixed, Fixed With Tolerance, Conditional Min] |  | Yes |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of constraint imposed on the count for the specified Work Center/Period combination.   Min: the count must be greater than or equal to the Constraint Value. Max: the count must be less than or equal to the Constraint Value. Fixed: the count must be equal to the Constraint Value. Fixed With Tolerance: The count must be equal to the Constraint Value * (1 +/- Relative Constraint Tolerance). Relative Constraint Tolerance is specified in the Model Run Options. Conditional Min: if the count is nonzero, it must be greater than or equal to the Constraint Value. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| ConstraintValue | int | NonNegative | Yes |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The numeric value that the specified count will be evaluated against. | [Integer] | [] |  |
| Status | [Include, Exclude] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | Include |  | Status dictates whether or not the constraint exists in the model. If Status is set to Exclude, this constraint (or constraints in the case of Enumerated Groups) will be ignored during the model run. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| CountingRule | [WorkCenters, Facilities, Periods] |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | WorkCenters: Count the number of unique Work Centers open during the specified Period(s). Facilities: Count the number of unique Facilities at which the specified Work Center can be opened. Periods: Count the number of unique Periods in which the specified Work Center(s) are open. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| Notes | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  |  | [NaN] | [] |  |

### シート: WorkCenterQueueDetails

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | MasterColumn |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WorkCenterName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | WorkCenters |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The Work Center that the queue logic is applied for | [NaN] | [] | WorkCenterName |
| FacilityName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Facilities | Yes | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The Facility at which the Work Center is located. | [NaN] | [] | FacilityName |
| ReviewPeriodFirstTime | Date/Time |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The first Date/Time at which to review the queue for the specified Work Center. Work Center queues will be evaluated using the logic specified in the Priority Logic field. After this Date/Time, the review period length will dictate when Work Center queue reviews occur. If NULL, Review Period First Time will be the start of the simulation. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| ReviewPeriod | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | ReviewSchedules |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The time between Work Center queue reviews. After Review Period First Time, a Work Center queue review will occur each time Review Period has elapsed. For example, if Review Period First Time is 1/1/2022 12:00:00 AM and Review Period is six hours, we will conduct reviews on 1/1/2022 at 12:00:00 AM, 6:00:00 AM, 12:00:00 PM, and 6:00:00 PM, continuing similarly until the simulation ends. A Review Schedule defined in the Review Schedules table can be entered by Review Schedule Name in this field as well. If NULL, continuous review is used. | [Time] | [] | ReviewScheduleName |
| ReviewPeriodUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Time] |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] | [Time] |  | {PrimaryTimeUOM} |  | The unit of measure (Type = Time) that defines Review Period length. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| QueueingPriorityLogic | [FIFO, ByDueDateAndLocation, ByDayQueuedAndLocation, ProductionWheel] |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | FIFO |  | The logic used for the Work Center when deciding how to arrange process lots in the work center queue. If a value of By Date And Location is selected, the QueuePriority fields in the Customers, Facilities, and Suppliers will be leveraged. If the Advanced Queueing Details table is populated, the override priorities for the Origin, Destination, Product combination will be used | [NaN] | [] |  |
| QueueingPriorityLogicValue | String | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | ProductionWheelDetails |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The value associated with the given queueing priority logic.  For ProductionWheel this will contain the name of the wheel | [NaN] | [] | ProductionWheelName |
| SecondaryQueueingPriorityLogic | [MinimizeChangeover] |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | MinimizeChangeover |  | The logic used to break ties within the work center queue | [NaN] | [] |  |
| Status | [Include, Exclude] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | Include |  | Status dictates whether or not the policy exists in the model. If Status is set to Exclude, the policy record is ignored during the model run. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| TimeInQueueCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with an item sitting in a queue. The cost expressed in this field will be charged each time that items sit in a queue for the length of time specified in the Time In Queue Cost UOM field. | [Cost] | [] |  |
| TimeInQueueCostUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  | TimeInQueueCost |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [] | [Time] |  | {PrimaryTimeUOM} |  | The unit of measure that time is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| Notes | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  |  | [NaN] | [] |  |

### シート: WorkCenters

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | MasterColumn |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WorkCenterName | Name |  | Yes |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Work Center. This value can be referenced in other tables involving Work Centers. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| FacilityName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Facilities | Yes | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The Facility at which the Work Center will be located. If a Facility Group is used, identical Work Centers will be associated with each Facility in the Group. | [NaN] | [] | FacilityName |
| Status | [Include, Exclude] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | Include |  | Status dictates whether or not the Work Center will be included in the scenario run. If the Status is set to Exclude, all elements of the Work Center will be ignored and any mentions of the Work Center in other input tables will be ignored as well | [NaN] | [] |  |
| WorkCenterStatus | [Open, Closed, Consider] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | Open |  | Work Center Status dictates whether or not the Work Center is to be actively included in the model. If the Work Center Status is set to Consider, the Work Center may either be opened (Initial State = Potential) or closed (Initial State = Existing) depending on what is optimal. If the Work Center Status is set to be  excluded from the model, any associated closing costs will still be applied and any records for this Work Center in other tables will be ignored. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| InitialState | [Existing, Potential] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | Existing |  | If Initial State = Existing, the Work Center currently exists in the specified Facility. If Initial State = Potential, the Work Center will be considered for inclusion in the network during the model run. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| MinimumThroughput | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  | 0 |  | The minimum throughput of the Work Center. This minimum throughput applies to all periods in the model horizon; period-specific throughput minimums can be defined in the Work Centers Multi Time Period table. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| MinimumThroughputUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | MinimumThroughput |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [NEO] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Optimization: Currently supports [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time] | The unit of measure that defines Minimum Throughput. Quantity, Volume, Weight and Time units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ThroughputCapacity | double | NonNegative |  | 0 |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The capacity of the Work Center (throughput). This Capacity is applied over each period in the horizon. Period-specific capacities can be defined in the Work Centers Multi Time Period table. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| ThroughputCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | ThroughputCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Optimization: Currently supports [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time] | The unit of measure that defines Throughput Capacity. Quantity, Volume, Weight and Time units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ThroughputCapacityPeriod | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | For Simulation runs, this field will specify the length of time over which the throughput capacity will be applied. For example, the Throughput Capacity might be set to 500 EA with Capacity Period = 1 and Capacity Period UOM = DAY - this would mean that the Work Center could process no more than 500 units in any day. The first period will be evaluated at the Simulation Start Time, and throughput capacity will be evaluated over the specified period length. Capacity is evaluated over individual capacity periods, a rolling capacity is not considered. | [Time] | [] |  |
| ThroughputCapacityPeriodUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Time] |  | ThroughputCapacityPeriod |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [THROG, DENDRO] | [Time] |  | {PrimaryTimeUOM} |  | The unit of measure (Type = Time) that defines Throughput Capacity Period. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| FixedOperatingCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  | 0 | Optimization: Currently supports doubles and named step costs that are defined in the StepCosts table where StepCostBehavior = Stepwise | The fixed cost associated with operating the Work Center. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step cost is used, the Work Center's throughput for each period will be used to determine Fixed Operating Cost. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| FixedStartupCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  | 0 | Optimization: Currently supports doubles | If Status = Consider and Initial State = Potential, the Fixed Startup Cost will be incurred if the Work Center is opened during the model solve. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step cost is used, this cost will be determined based on the largest throughput recorded in any of the periods for which the Work Center will be operating once opened. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| FixedClosingCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  | 0 | Optimization: Currently supports doubles | If Status = Consider and Initial State = Existing, the Fixed Closing Cost will be incurred if the Work Center is closed during the model solve. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step function is used, this cost will be determined based on the largest throughput recorded in any of the periods for which the Work Center was operating. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| InboundQueueCapacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The maximum allowable size of the Inbound Queue of the Work Center. If NULL, the capacity of the Inbound Queue is assumed to be infinite. If zero, no Inbound Queue is allowed. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| InboundQueueCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | InboundQueueCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Simulation: Currently evaluates Queue Capacity as the number of jobs in the queue | The unit of measure that defines Inbound Queue Capacity. Quantity, Volume, and Weight units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| OutboundQueueCapacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The maximum allowable size of the Outbound Queue of the Work Center. If NULL, the capacity of the Outbound Queue is assumed to be infinite. If zero, no Outbound Queue is allowed. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| OutboundQueueCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | OutboundQueueCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Simulation: Currently evaluates Queue Capacity as the number of jobs in the queue | The unit of measure that defines Outbound Queue Capacity. Quantity, Volume, and Weight units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ChangeoverName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | ChangeoverTimes |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name for the set of Changeover times that will apply at this Work Center. Changeover times and costs are specified in the Changeover Times table and will be entered as Current Product / Next Product combinations. | [NaN] | [] | ChangeoverName |
| OperatingSchedule | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessHours |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The schedule (defined in the Business Hours table) dictating when the Work Center will be operational. If no schedule is specified, the Work Center is assumed to operate 24 hours per day. | [NaN] | [] | ScheduleName |
| OperatingCalendar | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessCalendars |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The calendar (defined in the Business Calendars table) dictating which days of the year the Work Center will shut down. If no calendar is specified, the Work Center is assumed to be operational every day. | [NaN] | [] | CalendarName |
| FixedCO2Emissions | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  | 0 |  | The fixed amount of CO2 Emissions at this Work Center. This can be thought of as the amount of CO2 that needs to be offset for the facility to exist in the network. Variable CO2 Emissions can be defined for specific production or transportation activities in the Production Policy and Transportation Policy tables. | [Cost] | [] |  |
| Notes | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  |  | [NaN] | [] |  |

### シート: WorkCentersMultiTimePeriod

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | MasterColumn |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PeriodName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Periods | Yes | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The period name in which a change is being made. Groups of periods are also supported. Changes that are made in the Multi Time Period table will be applied as overrides for the records of the base table for the specified periods only. Additionally, only the fields that contain information needing to be updated are required to be entered, in the absence of data in the Multi Time Period table the data from the standard table will be persisted | [NaN] | [] | PeriodName |
| WorkCenterName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | WorkCenters | Yes | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Work Center. This value can be referenced in other tables involving Work Centers. | [NaN] | [] | WorkCenterName |
| FacilityName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  | Yes | Facilities | Yes | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The Facility at which the Work Center will be located. If a Facility Group is used, identical Work Centers will be associated with each Facility in the Group. | [NaN] | [] | FacilityName |
| Status | [Include, Exclude] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | Include |  | Status dictates whether or not the multi-time period record exists in the model. If Status is set to Exclude, the record is ignored during the model run. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| WorkCenterStatus | [Open, Closed, Consider] |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | Work Center Status dictates whether or not the Work Center is to be actively included in the model. If the Work Center Status is set to Consider, the Work Center may either be opened (Initial State = Potential) or closed (Initial State = Existing) depending on what is optimal. If the Work Center Status is set to be  excluded from the model, any associated closing costs will still be applied and any records for this Work Center in other tables will be ignored. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| MinimumThroughput | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The minimum throughput of the Work Center for the given period. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| MinimumThroughputUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | MinimumThroughput |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [NEO] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Optimization: Currently supports [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time] | The unit of measure that defines Minimum Throughput. Quantity, Volume, Weight and Time units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ThroughputCapacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  | Optimization: Changes will not be supported for Facilities with a status in the Facilities table of Consider | The capacity of the Work Center (throughput). This Capacity applies to the entire model horizon; period-specific capacities can be defined in the Work Centers Multi Time Period table. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| ThroughputCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | ThroughputCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} | Optimization: Changes will not be supported for Facilities with a status in the Facilities table of Consider | The unit of measure that defines Throughput Capacity. Quantity, Volume, and Weight units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ThroughputCapacityPeriod | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | For Simulation runs, this field will specify the length of time over which the throughput capacity will be applied. For example, the Throughput Capacity might be set to 500 EA with Capacity Period = 1 and Capacity Period UOM = DAY - this would mean that the Work Center could process no more than 500 units in any day. The first period will be evaluated at the Simulation Start Time, and throughput capacity will be evaluated over the specified period length. Capacity is evaluated over individual capacity periods, a rolling capacity is not considered. | [Time] | [] |  |
| ThroughputCapacityPeriodUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Time] |  | ThroughputCapacityPeriod |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [THROG, DENDRO] | [Time] |  | {PrimaryTimeUOM} |  | The unit of measure (Type = Time) that defines Throughput Capacity Period. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| FixedOperatingCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  |  | Optimization: Currently supports doubles and named step costs that are defined in the StepCosts table where StepCostBehavior = Stepwise | The fixed cost associated with operating the Work Center. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step cost is used, the Work Center's throughput for each period will be used to determine Fixed Operating Cost. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| FixedStartupCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If Status = Consider and Initial State = Potential, the Fixed Startup Cost will be incurred if the Work Center is opened during the model solve. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step cost is used, this cost will be determined based on the largest throughput recorded in any of the periods for which the Work Center will be operating once opened. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| FixedClosingCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If Status = Consider and Initial State = Existing, the Fixed Closing Cost will be incurred if the Work Center is closed during the model solve. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step function is used, this cost will be determined based on the largest throughput recorded in any of the periods for which the Work Center was operating. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| InboundQueueCapacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The maximum allowable size of the Inbound Queue of the Work Center. If NULL, the capacity of the Inbound Queue is assumed to be infinite. If zero, no Inbound Queue is allowed. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| InboundQueueCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | InboundQueueCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} |  | The unit of measure that defines Inbound Queue Capacity. Quantity, Volume, and Weight units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| OutboundQueueCapacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The maximum allowable size of the Outbound Queue of the Work Center. If NULL, the capacity of the Outbound Queue is assumed to be infinite. If zero, no Outbound Queue is allowed. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| OutboundQueueCapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | OutboundQueueCapacity |  | UnitsOfMeasure |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, ProcessLot] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} |  | The unit of measure that defines Outbound Queue Capacity. Quantity, Volume, and Weight units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| ChangeoverName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | ChangeoverTimes |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name for the set of Changeover times that will apply at this Work Center. Changeover times and costs are specified in the Changeover Times table and will be entered as Current Product / Next Product combinations. | [NaN] | [] | ChangeoverName |
| OperatingSchedule | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessHours |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The schedule (defined in the Business Hours table) dictating when the Work Center will be operational. If no schedule is specified, the Work Center is assumed to operate 24 hours per day. | [NaN] | [] | ScheduleName |
| OperatingCalendar | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessCalendars |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The calendar (defined in the Business Calendars table) dictating which days of the year the Work Center will shut down. If no calendar is specified, the Work Center is assumed to be operational every day. | [NaN] | [] | CalendarName |
| FixedCO2Emissions | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  | 0 |  | The fixed amount of CO2 Emissions at this Work Center for the given period. This can be thought of as the amount of CO2 that needs to be offset for the facility to exist in the network. Variable CO2 Emissions can be defined for specific production or transportation activities in the Production Policy and Transportation Policy tables. | [Cost] | [] |  |
| Notes | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  |  | [NaN] | [] |  |

### シート: WorkResources

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | MasterColumn |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WorkResourceName | Name |  | Yes |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Work Resource. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| FacilityName | Name | ExistsInMasterTable | Yes |  | Yes | Facilities | Yes | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The Facility at which the Work Resource will be located. If a Facility Group is used, identical Work Resources will be associated with each Facility in the Group. | [NaN] | [] | FacilityName |
| AvailableUnits | int | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The units of the Work Resource available at the specified Facility. If left blank, an infinite amount of resources will be assumed | [Integer] | [] |  |
| Status | [Include, Exclude] |  | Yes |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  | Include |  | Status dictates whether or not the Work Resource is included in the model. If Status is set to Consider, the Work Resource may either be included (Type = Potential) or excluded (Type = Existing) depending on what is optimal. If the Work Resource is excluded from the model, it will be dropped from Routing records that reference it. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| Capacity | double | NonNegative |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The capacity of the Work Center (throughput or time). This Capacity applies to the entire model horizon; period-specific capacities can be defined in the Work Centers Multi Time Period table. | [Quantity] | [] |  |
| CapacityUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight] |  | Capacity |  |  |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} |  | The unit of measure that defines Throughput Capacity. Quantity, Volume, Weight, and Time units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| UnitCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [All Item, Incremental] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [] |  |  | 0 |  | The cost associated with completing one unit of work using the Work Resource. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| UnitCostUOM | Name | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE UnitsOfMeasure.Type = [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time] |  | UnitCost |  |  |  | [] | [Quantity, Volume, Weight, Time] |  | {PrimaryQuantityUOM} |  | The unit of measure that defines Unit Cost. Quantity, Volume, Weight, and Time units of measure are supported. | [NaN] | [] | Symbol |
| FixedOperatingCost | Cost Time Expression | ExistsInMasterTable WHERE StepCosts.StepCostBehavior = [Stepwise] |  |  |  | StepCosts |  | [] |  |  | 0 |  | The fixed cost associated with operating the Work Resource. This field can support a single numeric value or a step cost (entered directly or a lookup of a record in the Step Costs table). If a step cost is used, the Work Resource's throughput for the entire model horizon will be used to determine Fixed Operating Cost. Period-specific costs can be defined in the Work Centers Multi Time Period table. | [Cost] | [] | StepCostName |
| OperatingSchedule | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessHours |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The schedule (defined in the Business Hours table) dictating when the Work Resource will be operational. If no schedule is specified, the Work Center is assumed to operate 24 hours per day. | [NaN] | [] | ScheduleName |
| OperatingCalendar | Name | ExistsInMasterTable |  |  |  | BusinessCalendars |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The calendar (defined in the Business Calendars table) dictating which days of the year the Work Resource will shut down. If no calendar is specified, the Work Resource is assumed to be operational every day. | [NaN] | [] | CalendarName |
| Notes | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  |  | [NaN] | [] |  |

## Anura 2.8 Output Data Structure（出力テーブル仕様書）
**ソースURL:** https://optilogic.com/resources/help-center/docs/downloadable-anura-data-structure---outputs
**ファイル:** Anura-2.8-Outputs.xlsx

このファイルは Cosmic Frog (Anura エンジン) の入出力テーブル仕様書です。
各シートにテーブル名・フィールド名・データ型・説明が記載されています。

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

| TableName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the table where the error has identified. | [NaN] | [] |
| ColumnName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the column where the error has been identified. | [NaN] | [] |
| ValidationRule | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the internal validation rule that the optimization engine found a problem in. | [NaN] | [] |
| ErrorType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The listed type of error associated with the validation rule. | [NaN] | [] |
| ErrorMessage | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | A description of the reported error. | [NaN] | [] |
| Severity | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The severity value of the identified error, this will be 0 to 3 with 3 being the most severe.  0 - Informational Errors  1 - Minor Errors  2 - Moderate Errors  3- Critical - Infeasible or Failed Model | [NaN] | [] |
| IdentifiedValue | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The value that has been identified as the source of the error | [NaN] | [] |
| Action | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | If corrective action was taken, the data adjustment performed by the solver will be listed here. | [NaN] | [] |
| ValueReplaced | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | If a value had to be replaced, the updated value will be listed here. | [NaN] | [] |
| Count | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [CYCLO] |  |  |  |  | The number of times that the error occurred. | [Integer] | [] |

| TotalCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 Emissions across the network for this period. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalFixedCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total fixed CO2 emissions across the network for this period. This is specified as the total of Fixed CO2 Emissions at all Facilities and Work Centers. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| FixedCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to Fixed CO2 Emissions across the network for this period. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTransportationCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions attributed to transport across the network for this period. This is taken as the total CO2 Emissions from the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalTransportationCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 emissions of transport across the network for this period. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions attributed to production across the network for this period. This is taken as the total CO2 Emissions from the Optimization Production Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 emissions of production at this Work Center. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalSupplyCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions attributed to supply across the network for this period. This is taken as the total CO2 Emissions from the Optimization Supply Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalSupplyCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 emissions of supply across the network for this period. | [Cost] | [NEO] |

### シート: OptimizationConstraintSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | Disaggregation logic |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ConstraintName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name assigned to the constraint by the optimization solver. Depending on the type of constraint, only applicable fields will be populated with the constraint details that apply. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Period. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| OriginName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Origin location. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| DestinationName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Destination location. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Product. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ModeName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Mode. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Process. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| WorkCenterName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Work Center. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| BOMName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the BOM. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ConstraintType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of Constraint, one of Min, Max, Fixed, or Conditional Min | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ConstraintValue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The requirement of the Constraint. This is the populated Constraint value field of the corresponding constraint table. | [Constraint] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ConstraintActivity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The resulting activity of the constraint will be reported here. | [Constraint] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| SlackPercentage | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Slack Percentage will show how close the constraints were to being binding. For a Constraint Type of Max, the percentage will be reported as Constraint Activity / Constraint Value. | [Percentage] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ConstraintViolation | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If a model is infeasible and constraints must be relaxed, the Constraint Violation field will show how much the constraint had to be relaxed for a feasible solution to be obtained. | [Constraint] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| SuggestedConstraintValue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If a model is infeasible and constraints must be relaxed, the Suggest Constraint Value will show what the constraint value must be adjusted to for a feasible solution to be obtained. | [Constraint] | [NEO] | ByRatio |

### シート: OptimizationCostToServeSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | Disaggregation logic |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| SiteName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Customer that Cost To Serve information is being reported for. In the cases where ending inventory exists at a Facility at the end of the model horizon, Facilities can also be reported. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| SiteType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of site, either Customer or Facility, of the listed Site Name. Facilities can be listed in the Cost To Serve table if there is ending inventory at the Facility for the last period of the model. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Product that Cost To Serve information is being reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost to serve the reported quantity of the listed product to the listed site. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| Revenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total revenue generated by serving the reported quantity of the listed product to the listed customer location. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| Profit | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total profit generated by serving the reported quantity of the listed product to the listed customer location. | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| Quantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of product that was served to the listed Site / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost per unit to serve the listed product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The revenue per unit generated for the listed product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitProfit | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The profit per unit generated for the listed product / site combination. | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitTransportationCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The per unit Transportation Cost associated with serving the product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitShipmentCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The per unit Shipment Cost associated with serving the product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitFuelSurchargeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The per unit Fuel Surcharge Cost associated with serving the product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PerUnitMultiStopRouteCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The per unit Multi Stop Route Cost associated with serving the product / site combination. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |

### シート: OptimizationCustomerRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| CustomerName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Customer. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| CustomerRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Customer. This is based on a weighted average of the Concentration Risk, Source Count Risk, Geographic Risk and the User Defined Risk of the Customer across the entire model horizon.  The Customer Risk Score is used to calculate the overall Risk Score in the Optimization Risk Metrics Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the demand concentration at the Customer location. This is reported as a weighted average over all Periods based off of the Concentration Risk in the Optimization Customer Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Customer uses across all products. This is reported as a weighted average over all Periods based off of the Source Count Risk in the Optimization Customer Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

### シート: OptimizationCustomerSummary

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | Name |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| PeriodName | Name |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| CustomerName | Name |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Customer. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalOriginalDemandQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the input demand quantity for the Customer across all products. This is specified in the Customer Demand input table and will be the sum of all demand records that are included at the Customer. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The total of the served demand quantity for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all served demand quantity for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalUnservedDemandQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the unserved demand quantity for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all unserved demand quantity for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the return quantity for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all returned quantity for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| DemandQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalOriginalDemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the input demand volume for the Customer across all products. This is specified in the Customer Demand input table and will be the sum of all demand records that are included at the Customer. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the served demand volume for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all served demand volume for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the unserved demand volume for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all unserved demand volume for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the return volume for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all returned volume for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| DemandVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalOriginalDemandWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the input demand weight for the Customer across all products. This is specified in the Customer Demand input table and will be the sum of all demand records that are included at the Customer. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the served demand weight for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all served demand weight for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the unserved demand weight for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all unserved demand weight for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total of the return weight for the Customer across all products. This is calculated based on the sum of all returned weight for the Customer reported in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [eight] | [NEO] |
| DemandWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total revenue associated with this Customer. This is calculated based on the sum of all reported revenue for the Customer in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandPenaltyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total penalty cost associated with unserved demand records at this Customer. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| CustomerRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Customer / Period. This is based on a weighted average of the Concentration Risk, Source Count Risk, Geographic Risk and User Defined Risk of the Customer. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the demand concentration at the Customer location. This is reported as a weighted average based off of the Concentration Risk over all Products in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Customer uses across all products. This is reported as a weighted average based off of the Source Count Risk over all Products in the Optimization Demand Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

| ProductOriginLocation | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If the Product Origin Location field was populated for the given Customer / Product / Period in the Customer Demand Origin Policies table, this will report the path origin for the product. If there was not an entry in the Customer Demand Origin Policies table, this will be blank. | [NaN] | [] |  |

| DemandQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| DemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The demand volume as specified in the Customer Demand table. In the event of multiple demand records for a Customer / Product / Period combination, the demand will be summed into one single demand record. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |

| DemandWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The customer latitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The customer longitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |

| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Concentration Risk score associated with this Customer / Product / Period combination. Concentration Risk is based on what portion of the total demand for the Customer / Period combination the listed product represents. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |

Source Count Risk is determined based on the number of unique sources that are used to satisfy the demand records at this Customer / Period combination for the listed product. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |

### シート: OptimizationFacilityRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [DART] |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| FacilityRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Facility. This is based on a weighted average of the Facility's Concentration, Source Count, Utilization, Geographic and User Defined Risk across the entire model horizon.  The Facility Risk Score is used to calculate the overall Risk Score in the Risk Metrics Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the throughput concentration of the Facility. This is reported as a weighted average over all periods based off of the Concentration Risk in the Optimization Facility Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Facility uses across all products and periods. This is reported as a weighted average based off of the Source Count Risk in the Optimization Facility Summary table.  Using fewer sources results in higher risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Facility is during the model solve. This is calculated as the weighted average of Storage Capacity Risk, Throughput Capacity Risk, and the Work Center Capacity Risk. Additional details can be found in the Optimization Capacity Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Facilities table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

### シート: OptimizationFacilitySummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| InitialState | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The initial state of the Facility. This is specified in the Initial State field of the Facilities table and will be one of Existing or Potential | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| InitialStatus | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Initial Status of the Facility. This is specified in the Facility Status field of the Facilities table and will be one of Open, Closed or Consider. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| OptimizedStatus | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The status of the Facility based on the optimization's results. This will be one of Open, Closed or Consider. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalFacilityCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost associated with the Facility. This will be reported as the sum of the Fixed Operating Cost, Fixed Startup Cost, Fixed Closing Cost, Inbound Handling Cost, Outbound Handling Cost, Prebuild Holding Cost, Turn Estimated Holding Cost, Storage Cost, In Transit Holding Cost, Production Cost and Process Cost for all activities associated with the Facility. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| OperatingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The fixed operating cost of the Facility. This is specified in the Fixed Operating Cost field of the Facilities table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| StartupCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The startup cost of the Facility. If a Facility opens in a period then the fixed startup cost will be applied. This is specified in the Fixed Startup Cost field of the Facilities table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| ClosingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The closing cost of the Facility. If a Facility closes in a period then the fixed closing cost will be applied. This is specified in the Fixed Closing Cost field of the Facilities table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalInboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with inbound handling at the Facility for the listed Product. This is calculated as the sum of Inbound Handling Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalOutboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with outbound handling at the Facility for the listed Product. This is calculated as the sum of Outbound Handling Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalPrebuildHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of average prebuild inventory. This is calculated as the sum of Prebuild Holding Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTurnEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of turn estimated inventory. This is calculated as the sum of Turn Estimated Holding Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTransportationEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of transportation estimated inventory. This is calculated as the sum of Transportation Estimated Holding Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalProductionEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of production estimated inventory. This is calculated as the sum of Production Estimated Holding Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalStorageCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost of storage for the Product at the Facility. This is calculated as the sum of Storage Costs across all products for the Facility as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalInTransitHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of In-Transit Inventory that has been assigned to the Facility. This is calculated as the sum of In Transit Holding Costs across all products that are assigned to the Facility as reported in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with production at the Facility. This is calculated as the sum of Production Cost across all products as reported in the Optimization Production Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProcessCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with processes at the Facility. This is calculated as the sum of Process Unit Costs and Process Fixed costs for all processes used at the Facility as reported in the Optimization Process Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalStockingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost associated with stocking cost at the Facility. This is taken as the total Stocking Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalDestockingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost associated with destocking cost at the Facility. This is taken as the total Destocking Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalInboundQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of inbound flow across all products into the Facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalOutboundQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of outbound flow across all products out of the Facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of inventory at the Facility. This is reported as the sum of Average Prebuild Inventory Quantity, Average Turn Estimated Inventory Quantity, Average Transportation Estimated Inventory Quantity and Average Production Estimated Inventory Quantity across all products as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of production across all products at the Facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalInboundVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of inbound flow across all products into the Facility. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalOutboundVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of outbound flow across all products out of the Facility. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalInventoryVolume | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of inventory at the Facility. This is reported as the sum of Average Prebuild Inventory Volume, Average Turn Estimated Inventory Volume, Average Transportation Estimated Inventory Volume and Average Production Estimated Inventory Volume across all products as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of production across all products at the Facility. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| VolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalInboundWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of inbound flow across all products into the Facility. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalOutboundWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of outbound flow across all products out of the Facility. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of inventory at the Facility. This is reported as the sum of Average Prebuild Inventory Weight, Average Turn Estimated Inventory Weight, Average Transportation Estimated Inventory Weight and Average Production Estimated Inventory Weight across all products as reported in the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of production across all products at the Facility. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| WeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputCapacity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The throughput capacity for the Facility. This is specified in the Throughput Capacity field of the Facilities table. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| ThroughputCapacityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the throughput capacity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputUtilization | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The throughput utilization of the Facility for this period. Utilization is calculated as the Throughput divided by the Throughput Capacity. | [Percentage] | [NEO, DART] |
| StorageCapacity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The storage capacity for this Facility. This is specified in the Storage Capacity field of the Facilities table and is measured as Max Turns Estimated Inventory + Ending Prebuild Inventory. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| StorageCapacityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the storage capacity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| StorageUtilization | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The storage utilization of the Facility for this period. Utilization is calculated as the Total Inventory/Storage Capacity. This is meant to capture average utilization during the period. | [Percentage] | [NEO, DART] |
| FacilityRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Facility. This is based on a weighted average of the Concentration Risk, Source Count Risk, Utilization Risk, Geographic Risk and the User Defined Risk of the Facility. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the throughput concentration of the Facility location. This is calculated based on the throughput quantity of the facility relative to the total demanded quantity across all products for the period. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Facility uses across all products. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Facility is during the model solve. This is calculated as the weighted average of Storage Utilization Risk, Throughput Utilization Risk, and the Work Center Utilization Risk. Additional details can be found in the Optimization Utilization Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Facilities table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions at this facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 Emissions at this facility. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| FixedCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The fixed CO2 emissions at this Facility. This is specified in the FixedCO2 emissions column of the Facilities table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| FixedCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to Fixed CO2 Emissions at this facility. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions attributed to production at this facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 emissions of production at this facility. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
