| FlowType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of flow that the record represents. Customer Fulfillment will represent flows from Facilities to Customers, Replenishment will represent flows from Facilities to other Facilities, Procurement will represent flows from Suppliers to Facilities and Drop Ship will represent flows from Suppliers to Customers. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| OriginName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Facility or Supplier or Customer that the flow originated from. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| DestinationName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Customer or Facility location that the flow arrived to. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Product the flow record is for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| ModeName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Transportation Mode used for this flow. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| FlowQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of the flow units for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] | ByRatio |
| FlowQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FlowVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of the flow units for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FlowVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FlowWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of the flow units for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FlowWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| SourcingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The sourcing cost associated with this flow record. Sourcing costs will be defined in the Unit Cost field of the Customer Fulfillment, Replenishment or Procurement Policy tables. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ReturnCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with return flow records. Sourcing costs will be defined in the Unit Cost field of Return Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportationCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The transportation cost associated with this flow record. Transportation Costs will be defined by the Unit Cost field of the Transportation Policies or Transportation Modes table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ShipmentCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The proportion of the fixed cost entered in the Transportation Policies that will apply to the product flow. In the case of grouped products, the complete shipment costs are reported in the Optimization Shipment Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| MultiStopRouteCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The proportion of multi-stop route attributed to this flow record. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| UserDefinedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The proportion of user defined cost attributed to this flow record. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| DutyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The duty cost associated with this flow record. Duty Cost will be defined as a percentage of product value in the Duty Rate column of the Transportation Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| InTransitHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost associated with the in-transit inventory estimate for this flow record. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| InboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The handling cost associated with inbound flow of the listed product into the Destination facility. This cost is specified in the Warehousing Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| OutboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The handling cost associated with outbound flow of the listed product from the Origin facility. This cost is specified in the Warehousing Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FuelSurchargeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The fuel surcharge cost associated with this flow. This cost is specified in the Transportation Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TotalCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost for this product flow record. This will be made up of the Transportation Cost, Shipment Cost, Duty Cost and the In-Transit Inventory Cost. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The distance of the flow record. Distance will be determined from the Transport Distance in the Transportation Policies table, or if no distance is entered a default distance calculation will have been used. | [Distance] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| TotalTransportDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total distance traveled by all shipments on this flow record. This is calculated as the number of shipments required multiplied by the Transport Distance. Fractional shipments are not rounded up, so if 1.5 shipments are used, the TotalTransportDistance is 1.5 times the TransportDistance. This is consistent with all other prorated flow metrics, including costs. | [Distance] | [] |  |
| TransportDistanceUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the distance is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| TransportTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The time taken to move from the Origin to the Destination for the flow record. The time will be determined based on the Transport Time field in the Transportation Policies table, or if no time is entered then a default speed will be used to determine the time based on the flow distance. | [Time] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| TransportTimeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the time is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of estimated inventory attributed to deliveries for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. This is calculated from the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of estimated inventory attributed to deliveries for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. This is calculated from the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of estimated inventory attributed to deliveries for the listed Origin / Destination / Mode / Period combination. This is calculated from the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost associated with the transportation estimated inventory. | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| TransportTimeRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long of a transport time the flow has. This will contribute to the model's overall Network Risk score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| TimeToImportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long it can take imported products to clear customs as they enter the destination country. This contributes to the model's overall Network Risk score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| TimeToExportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long it can take exported products to clear customs as they leave the origin country. This contributes to the model's overall Network Risk Score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| CO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| CO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 Emissions. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| OriginLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The origin latitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| OriginLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The origin longitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| DestinationLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The destination latitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |  |
| DestinationLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The destination longitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |  |

### シート: OptimizationGeographicRiskMetr0

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| SiteName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the location that Geographic Risk Metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| SiteType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The type of site that the Geographic Risk Metrics are reported for. This will be one of Customer, Facility or Supplier. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with the geographic location of the site. This is a weighted average of Bio Lab Distance, Economic, Natural Disaster, Nuclear Distance, Political, Epidemic, and Labor Risks. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| BioLabDistanceRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the Site's proximity to a Level 4 Biolab. The closer the proximity, the higher the risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| EconomicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the economic characteristics of the Site's country.  This metric is using a combination of GDP and number of unique exporting products as reported by WorldBank. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| NaturalDisasterRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with potential economic devastation resulting from natural disasters that can impact the Site location. Considered natural disasters are droughts, floods, earthquakes, volcanic eruptions, landslides and cyclones. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| NuclearDistanceRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the Site's proximity to nuclear power plants. The closer the proximity, the higher the risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| PoliticalRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the political stability of the Site's country. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| EpidemicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with epidemic impacts on the Site's country. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| LaborRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with labor markets of the Site's country. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Site. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Site. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the throughput concentration of the Facility. This is calculated based on the throughput quantity of the facility relative to the total demanded quantity. Unlike NEO, TRIAD will only consider Throughput Capacity for Capacity Risk and therefore there is no further detailed output table on Capacity Risk Metrics in TRIAD. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Facility is during the model solve. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Greenfield Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Facilities table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Greenfield Facility. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FacilityType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The type of Facility, this will be one of Greenfield Facility, Candidate Facility, or Existing Facility. If the Facility was a newly selected location based on the model solve then it will be classified as a Type of Greenfield Facility | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| FixedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The fixed cost of the Facility. For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this entry comes from the Fixed Operating Cost in the Facilities table. For Greenfield Facilities, this cost comes from the Greenfield Facility Fixed Cost entry in the GreenfieldSettings table. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalInboundFlowCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of flows from Suppliers to this Facility. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalOutboundFlowCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of greenfield flows that originated at this Facility. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| DemandServed | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of demand that was serviced by this Facility. | [Quantity] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FacilityCapacity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The capacity of the listed Facility. For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this will be specified in the Throughput Capacity field of the Facilities table. For Greenfield Facilities, this will be specified in the Greenfield Facility Throughput Capacity entry of the Greenfield Settings table. | [Quantity] | [TRIAD] |
| FacilityUtilization | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The utilization of the listed Facility expressed as the Demand Served / Facility Capacity. | [Percentage] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| CustomersServed | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The number of customers that were serviced by this Facility. | [Integer] | [TRIAD] |
| AverageCustomerDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The average service distance for customers from this Facility. | [Distance] | [TRIAD] |
| FurthestCustomerDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The largest service distance for a customer that was serviced by this Facility. | [Distance] | [TRIAD] |
| DistanceUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that distance is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| City | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this will be the City specified in the City field of the Facilities table. For Greenfield Facilities, this will be determined by a reverse-geocoding operation using the Greenfield Facility's latitude and longitude coordinates. For Existing or Candidate Facilities that have no geodata information entered in the Facilities table, reverse-geocoding will also be utilized. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| PostalCode | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this will be the Postal Code specified in the Postal Code field of the Facilities table. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| Region | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this will be the Region specified in the Region field of the Facilities table. For Greenfield Facilities, this will be determined by a reverse-geocoding operation using the Greenfield Facility's latitude and longitude coordinates. For Existing or Candidate Facilities that have no geodata information entered in the Facilities table, reverse-geocoding will also be utilized. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| Country | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | For Candidate Facilities and Existing Facilities, this will be the Country specified in the Country field of the Facilities table. For Greenfield Facilities, this will be determined by a reverse-geocoding operation using the Greenfield Facility's latitude and longitude coordinates. For Existing or Candidate Facilities that have no geodata information entered in the Facilities table, reverse-geocoding will also be utilized. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FacilityRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Facility. This is based on a weighted average of the Concentration Risk, Utilization Risk, Geographic Risk and User Defined Risk of the Facility. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the throughput concentration of the Facility. This is calculated based on the throughput quantity of the facility relative to the total demanded quantity. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Facility is during the model solve. Unlike NEO, TRIAD will only consider Throughput Utilization for Utilization Risk and therefore there is no further detailed output table on Utilization Risk Metrics in TRIAD. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Greenfield Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Facilities table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FlowType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The type of flow that the record represents. Customer Fulfillment will represent flows from Facilities to Customers and Procurement will represent flows from Suppliers to Facilities. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| OriginName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Facility or Supplier that the flow originated from. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| DestinationName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Customer or Facility location that the flow arrived to. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FlowQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of the flow units for the listed Origin / Destination combination. | [Quantity] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| FlowCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The transportation cost associated with this flow record. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TransportDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The distance of the flow record. | [Distance] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| ServiceBandName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Greenfield Service Band that this flow record falls into. The band name will be defined in the Service Band Name field of the Greenfield Service Bands input table. Service Bands will only be populated for Customer Fulfillment flows. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| ServiceBandDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The distance of the Greenfield Service band that this flow record falls into. The most restrictive Service Band Distance will be populated here. Service Bands will only be populated for Customer Fulfillment flows. | [Distance] | [TRIAD] |
| DistanceUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the distance is expressed in terms of | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| TransportTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The transport time of the flow record. | [Time] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TransportTimeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the time is expressed in terms of | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| TransportTimeRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long of a transport time the flow has. This will contribute to the model's overall Network Risk score. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TimeToImportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long it can take imported products to clear customs as they enter the destination country. This contributes to the model's overall Network Risk score. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TimeToExportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk metric associated with how long it can take exported products to clear customs as they leave the origin country. This contributes to the model's overall Network Risk Score. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| OriginLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The origin latitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| OriginLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The origin longitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| DestinationLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The destination latitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| DestinationLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The destination longitude. | [GeoCoordinate] | [TRIAD, DART] |

| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| NetworkRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with Network activities in this scenario. This is calculated as the weighted average of the Product Stocking Point Count Risk, Product Make And Supply Count Risk, Transport Time Risk, Time To Import Risk and Time To Export Risk. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TransportTimeRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long of a transport time the flows have. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Transport Time Risk reported in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TimeToImportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long it can take imported products to clear customs. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Time To Import Risk in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| TimeToExportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long it can take exported products to clear customs. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Time To Export Risk in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |

| TRIADVersion | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The version of the TRIAD solver that was used for the scenario. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |

| TotalRunTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total time taken for the scenario run to complete. | [Time] | [TRIAD] |
| ResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The size of the solver resource that was selected to run the greenfield engine. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| ConsumedMemory | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The amount of memory (GB) that was consumed during the greenfield run. | [Quantity] | [TRIAD] |
| SuggestedResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The smallest resource size required to successfully solve the model. Recommended based on the consumed memory. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| NumberOfGreenfieldFacilities | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The number of Greenfield Facilities that were used for the run. | [Integer] | [TRIAD] |
| NumberOfExistingFacilities | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The number of Existing Facilities that were used for the run. Existing Facilities are Facilities with a Facility Status of Open. | [Integer] | [TRIAD] |
| NumberOfCandidateFacilities | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The number of Candidate Facilities that were used for the run. Candidate Facilities are Facilities with a Facility Status of Consider | [Integer] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of the greenfield run. This will include Facility Fixed Costs, Supplier to Facility flow costs, and Facility to Customer flow costs. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalFacilityFixedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of Facility fixed costs across the run. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalFlowCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of all flows. | [Cost] | [TRIAD] |
| TotalDemandServed | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of served demand at Customers. | [Quantity] | [TRIAD] |
| AverageFacilityDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The average distance of Supplier to Facility flows across the run. | [Distance] | [TRIAD] |
| AverageCustomerDistance | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The average distance of Facility to Customer flows across the run. | [Distance] | [TRIAD] |
| DistanceUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that distance is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [TRIAD] |
| PrimaryRiskRating | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Primary Risk Rating that is specified in the Model Settings. Details on all Risk Ratings can be found in the Greenfield Risk Metrics Summary table. | [NaN] | [TRIAD, DART] |
| RiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this scenario. The Risk Score is the weighted sum of Customer, Facility, Supplier, and Network Risk, and is populated for the Primary Risk Rating that is specified in the Model Settings. | [Risk] | [TRIAD, DART] |

| IdentifiedValue | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The value that has been identified as the source of the error | [NaN] | [] |
| Action | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | If corrective action was taken, the data adjustment performed by the solver will be listed here. | [NaN] | [] |

| Count | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [TRIAD] |  |  |  |  | The number of times that the error occurred. | [Integer] | [] |

| InventoryWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [] |  |

| DisposalCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to the Disposal. | [Cost] | [NEO] |  |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [] |  |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [] |  |

### シート: OptimizationInventorySummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | Disaggregation logic |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Product. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| AveragePrebuildInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The average amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. This is calculated based on the average between Starting and Ending Prebuild Inventory Quantities. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| StartingPrebuildInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The starting amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| EndingPrebuildInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The ending amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| MaxTurnEstimatedInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated amount of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified in the Inventory Policies table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TurnEstimatedInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated quantity of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified through the Time Between Turns column in the Inventory Policies table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated quantity of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Transportation as specified through the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| ProductionEstimatedInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The estimated quantity of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Productions as specified through the Time Between Productions column in the Production Policies table. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| TotalCycleInventoryQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of all estimated inventory for the Facility / Product / Period combination. This is taken as the total of Turn Estimated, Transportation Estimated  and Production Estimated Inventory. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| InventoryQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| AveragePrebuildInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The average amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. This is calculated based on the average between Starting and Ending Prebuild Inventory Volumes. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| StartingPrebuildInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The starting amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| EndingPrebuildInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The ending amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| MaxTurnEstimatedInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated amount of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified in the Inventory Policies table. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TurnEstimatedInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated volume of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified through the Time Between Turns column in the Inventory Policies table. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated volume of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Transportation as specified through the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Volume] | [] | ByRatio |
| ProductionEstimatedInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The estimated volume of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Productions as specified through the Time Between Productions column in the Production Policies table. | [Volume] | [] | ByRatio |
| TotalCycleInventoryVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of all estimated inventory for the Facility / Product / Period combination. This is taken as the total of Turn Estimated, Transportation Estimated  and Production Estimated Inventory. | [Volume] | [] | ByRatio |
| InventoryVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| AveragePrebuildInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The average amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. This is calculated based on the average between Starting and Ending Prebuild Inventory Weights. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| StartingPrebuildInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The starting amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| EndingPrebuildInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The ending amount of prebuild inventory for the listed Product at the Facility. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| MaxTurnEstimatedInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated amount of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified in the Inventory Policies table. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TurnEstimatedInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated weight of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Inventory Turns as specified through the Time Between Turns column in the Inventory Policies table. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The estimated weight of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Transportation as specified through the Time Between Deliveries column in the Transportation Policies table. | [Weight] | [] | ByRatio |
| ProductionEstimatedInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The estimated weight of inventory located at the Facility that is attributed to Productions as specified through the Time Between Productions column in the Production Policies table. | [Weight] | [] | ByRatio |
| TotalCycleInventoryWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total weight of all estimated inventory for the Facility / Product / Period combination. This is taken as the total of Turn Estimated, Transportation Estimated  and Production Estimated Inventory. | [Weight] | [] | ByRatio |
| InventoryWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| TotalInventoryCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Total Inventory Cost for the listed Product / Facility / Period combination. This is calculated as the sum of PreBuild Inventory Holding Cost, Turn Estimated Inventory Holding Cost and Inventory Storage Cost. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| PrebuildHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the amount of average prebuild inventory. This is determined based on the holding cost percentage in the Inventory Policies table and the Product's value. This cost is calculated as Average Prebuild Inventory * Product Unit Value * Inventory Carrying Cost Percentage * (Period Length in Days / 365) | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TurnEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the average amount of turn estimated inventory which is calculated as Max Turn Estimated Inventory / 2. The cost is determined based on the holding cost percentage in the Inventory Policies table and the Product's value. This cost is calculated as (Max Turn Estimated Inventory / 2) * Product Unit Value * Inventory Carrying Cost Percentage * (Period Length in Days / 365) | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| TransportationEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the average amount of transportation estimated inventory. The cost is determined based on the holding cost percentage in the Inventory Policies table and the Product's value. This cost is calculated as Transportation Estimated Inventory * Product Unit Value * Inventory Carrying Cost Percentage * (Period Length in Days / 365) | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| ProductionEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The holding cost charged to the average amount of production estimated inventory. The cost is determined based on the holding cost percentage in the Inventory Policies table and the Product's value. This cost is calculated as Production Estimated Inventory * Product Unit Value * Inventory Carrying Cost Percentage * (Period Length in Days / 365) | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| StorageCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost of storage for the Product at the Facility. This cost is separate from any holding costs and is described in the Unit Storage Cost field in the Inventory Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| UserDefinedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The proportion of user defined cost attributed to this inventory record. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |

### シート: OptimizationNetworkRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [DART] |
| NetworkRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with Network activities in this scenario. This is calculated as the weighted average of the Product Stocking Point Count Risk, Product Make And Supply Count Risk, Transport Time Risk, Time To Import Risk and Time To Export Risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ProductStockingPointCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of Facilities that the Product is stocked in Inventory. This is calculated as the weighted average of all Products Stocking Point Count Risk in the Optimization Product Risk Metrics table. The lower the number of stocking points, the higher the risk score. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ProductMakeAndSupplyCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of Facilities or Suppliers that the Product is either produced at or supplied from. This is calculated as the weighted average of the Make Adn Supply Count Risk in the Optimization Product Risk Metrics table.  The lower the number of production or supply locations, the higher the risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TransportTimeRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long of a transport time the flows have. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Transport Time Risk reported in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TimeToImportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long it can take imported products to clear customs. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Time To Import Risk in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TimeToExportRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how long it can take exported products to clear customs. This is calculated based off of the weighted average of Time To Export Risk in the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |

### シート: OptimizationNetworkSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| NEOVersion | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The version of the NEO solver that was used for the scenario run. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| DARTVersion | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The version of the DART solver that was used for the scenario run. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RunStartTime | Timestamp |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Date/Time when the scenario was run. Times are reported in UTC / Coordinated Universal Time. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalRunTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total time taken for the scenario run to complete. Total Run Time will be expressed in minutes. | [Time] | [NEO] |
| SolveTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The solve time taken during the scenario run. Solve Time will be expressed in minutes. | [Time] | [NEO] |
| OptimizationGapPercentage | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The gap percentage of the solution that was returned for the scenario. | [Percentage] | [NEO] |
| ResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The size of the solver resource that was selected to run the optimization. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ConsumedMemory | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The amount of memory (GB) that was consumed during the optimization run. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| SuggestedResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The smallest resource size required to successfully solve the model. Recommended based on the consumed memory. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| SolveType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of solve that was run. This will be one of Single Objective, Sequential Solve, or Infeasibility Diagnosis. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| SolveStatus | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The status of the optimization run. This will be one of Optimal, Infeasible, or Unbounded. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalSupplyChainCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of the scenario. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total revenue generated from all of the satisfied demand records in the scenario. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProfit | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total profit of the scenario, calculated as Total Revenue - Total Supply Chain Cost. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of demand that was served in the scenario run. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of demand that went unserved in this scenario run. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of returned product in the scenario run. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantities are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of demand that was served in the scenario run. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of demand that went unserved in this scenario run. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of returned product in the scenario run. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| VolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the volumes are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalServedDemandWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total weight of demand that was served in the scenario run. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total weight of demand that went unserved in this scenario run. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total weight of returned product in the scenario run. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| WeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weights are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalTransportationCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Unit Costs of the Transportation Policies. This is taken as the total Transportation Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalFuelSurchargeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Fuel Surcharge of the Transportation Policies. This is taken as the total Fuel Surcharge Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalShipmentCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Fixed Shipment Costs of the Transportation Policies. This is taken as the total Shipment Cost in the Optimization Flow Summary. It can also be found in the Optimization Shipment Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalMultiStopRouteCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Multi Stop Route Costs of the flows in this scenario. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalInTransitHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to In Transit Holding Costs. This is taken as the total In Transit Holding Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalDutyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Duty Rate in the Transportation Policies. This is taken as the total Duty Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTariffCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Tariffs. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalDisposalCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Disposals. This is taken as the total Disposal Cost from the Optimization Inventory Age Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalUnservedDemandPenaltyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total Penalty Cost resulted from not serving a customer demand at full quantity.. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProductionCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the Unit Costs of the Production Policies. This is taken as the total Production Cost from the Optimization Production Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalPrebuildHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the holding cost of pre build inventory. This is taken as the total Prebuild Holding Cost from the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTurnEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the holding cost of turn estimated inventory. This is taken as the total Turn Estimated Holding Cost from the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalTransportationEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the holding cost of transportation estimated inventory. This is taken as the total Transportation Estimated Holding Cost from the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalProductionEstimatedHoldingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the holding cost of transportation estimated inventory. This is taken as the total Transportation Estimated Holding Cost from the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalStorageCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the storage cost. This is taken as the total Storage Cost from the Optimization Inventory Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalSourcingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to sourcing from either Customer Fulfillment, Replenishment or Procurement Policy Unit Sourcing Cost. This is taken as the total Sourcing Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalReturnCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to returned product from Return Policy Unit Cost. This is taken as the total Return  Cost from the Optimization Flow Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalFixedOperatingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to fixed operating costs in the model. This is taken as the sum of Fixed Operating Cost from the Optimization Facility Summary and Optimization WorkCenter Summary tables. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalFixedStartupCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to fixed startup costs in the model. This is taken as the sum of Fixed Startup Cost from the Optimization Facility Summary and Optimization Work Center Summary tables. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalFixedClosingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to fixed closing costs in the model. This is taken as the sum of Fixed Closing Cost from the Optimization Facility Summary and Optimization Work Center Summary tables. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalInboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to inbound handling cost. This is taken as the total Inbound Handling Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalOutboundHandlingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to outbound handling cost. This is taken as the total Outbound Handling Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalStockingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to stocking cost. This is taken as the total Stocking Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalDestockingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to destocking cost. This is taken as the total Destocking Cost from the Optimization Warehousing Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalProcessCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to process unit costs. This is taken as the total Process Cost from the Optimization Process Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalSupplyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of introducing products at the suppliers. This is taken as the total Supply Cost from the Optimization Supply Summary table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalUserDefinedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to user defined costs. This is taken as the total Cost from the Optimization User Defined Cost Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 Emissions. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| PrimaryRiskRating | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Primary Risk Rating that is specified in the Model Settings. Details on all Risk Ratings can be found in the Risk Metrics Summary table. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this scenario. Details on the risk score can be found in the Optimization Risk Metrics Summary table.  The Risk Score is the weighted sum of Customer, Facility, Supplier, and Network Risk, and is populated for the Primary Risk Rating that is specified in the Model Settings. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |

If there was not an entry in the Customer Demand Origin Policies table, this will be blank. | [NaN] | [] |  |
| PathEndLocation | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | If the Product Origin Location field was populated for the given Customer / Product / Period in the Customer Demand Origin Policies table, this will report the path origin for the product. If there was not an entry in the Customer Demand Origin Policies table, this will be blank. | [NaN] | [] |  |

| OriginName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the destination. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |

Multiple quantities can be defined for a given Customer / Product / Period combination if there are multiple origin location requirements. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FlowQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FlowVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The demand volume as specified in the Customer Demand table. In the event of multiple demand records for a Customer / Product / Period combination, the demand will be summed into one single demand record. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FlowVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FlowWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The demand weight as specified in the Customer Demand table. In the event of multiple demand records for a Customer / Product / Period combination, the demand will be summed into one single demand record. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| FlowWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |

### シート: OptimizationProcessSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode | Disaggregation logic |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| StartingPeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Period in which production begins. For any Processes where the resulting processing time is less than the period length, Starting and Completion Periods will be the same. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| CompletionPeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Period in which production completes. For any Processes where the resulting processing time is less than the period length, Starting and Completion Periods will be the same. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility where the Process was used. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Product for which the Process was used. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Process. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of the Process. This will be determined by the policy table that the Process was assigned to and will be one of Production, Stocking, Destocking, Loading or Unloading. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| CurrentStepName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Step Name that the specific records are being reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| NextStepName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | In the case of multi-step Processes, the Step Name of the next step that was used will be reported here. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| WorkCenterName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Work Center that was used to complete the current step of the Process. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessedQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of the listed Product that was processed by the listed Process Step. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessedQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessedVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume of the listed Product that was processed by the listed Process Step. | [Volume] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessedVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessedWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight of the listed Product that was processed by the listed Process Step. | [Weight] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessedWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| YieldLossQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The quantity of product lost due to the Yield Percentage of the Process Step. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessedTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The time taken for the production of this Process Step. This is taken from the Processing Rate and the Fixed Time from the Processes table. | [Time] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessedTimeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the time is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |  |
| ProcessUnitCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The variable cost for the listed process step. This is specified in the Unit Cost field of the Processes table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| ProcessFixedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The fixed cost for the listed process step. This is specified in the Fixed Cost field of the Processes table. | [Cost] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| NumberOfLots | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | Total Number of Lots that is produced at this step. This is calculated as Processed Units / Lot Size. | [Quantity] | [NEO] | ByRatio |
| CO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The CO2 emissions from this process. | [Quantity] | [] | ByRatio |
| CO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to CO2 Emissions for this process. | [Cost] | [] | ByRatio |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |  |

| ObjectiveType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The type of the sequential objective that results are being reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] | Yes | N/A |
| UserDefinedObjectiveName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The User Defined Cost or User Defined Variable for which we are defining the Objective. If nothing is specified, All Costs/Variables will be considered. | [NaN] | [NEO] | Yes | N/A |
| Level | int |  |  |  | PK |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Level of the sequential optimization. | [Integer] | [NEO] |  |  |
| ConstraintType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The ConstraintType of the objective for the current level: 'Optimized, Unbounded, Lower Bound, Upper Bound | [NaN] | [NEO] | Yes | N/A |
| ConstraintValue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The value of the upper/lower bound constraint created using the objective value and the tolerance. | [Cost] | [NEO] |  |  |
| ObjectiveValue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The value of the listed Objective that was calculated at the end of the current Level solve. | [Cost] | [NEO] |  |  |

### シート: OptimizationShipmentSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| OriginName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Facility or Supplier or Customer that the shipment originated from. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| DestinationName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Customer or Facility location that the shipment arrived to. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ProductGroupName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Product Group the shipment record is reported for. This can be listed as an individual product if the Product Name in the Transportation Policies table was specified as an individual product and a Fixed Cost was entered. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ModeName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Transportation Mode used for this shipment. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| Shipments | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The number of shipments that moved along the transportation arc specified. This is calculated as the Flow Quantity / Average Shipment Size and will consider the Flow Quantity across all of the Products that are captured in the listed Product Group. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| ShipmentCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost associated with the number of shipments that were sent. This is specified in the Fixed Cost column of the Transportation Policies table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| ShipmentSize | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The shipment  size that was used to calculate the number of shipments. This is specified in the Average Shipment Size field of the Transportation Polices table. In the event that Average Shipment Size is not filled out in the Transportation Policies table, the Average Shipment Size of the Transportation Modes table will be used. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| ShipmentSizeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the Shipment Size is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| OriginLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Origin location. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
| OriginLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Origin location. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
| DestinationLatitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Destination location. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
| DestinationLongitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Destination location. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |

### シート: OptimizationSupplierRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [DART] |
| SupplierName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Supplier. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| SupplierRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Supplier. This is based on a weighted average of the Supplier's Concentration Risk, Utilization Risk, Geographic Risk and User Defined Risk across the entire model horizon. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the throughput concentration at the Supplier location. This is reported as a weighted average based off of the Concentration Risk in the Optimization Supplier Summary table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Supplier is during the model solve. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Supplier. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Suppliers table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Supplier. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Supplier. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

### シート: OptimizationSupplierSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| SupplierName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Supplier. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalSupplyCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of introducing products at the supplier. This is defined as the Unit Cost in the Suppliers Capabilities table.. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalSuppliedQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The quantity across all products that was supplied by the Supplier in the listed Period. | [Quantity] | [NEO, DART] |
| SuppliedQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalSuppliedVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The volume across all products that was supplied by the Supplier in the listed Period. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| SuppliedVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalSuppliedWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The weight across all products that was supplied by the Supplier in the listed Period. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| SuppliedWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| SupplierCapacity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The capacity for the Supplier. This is specified in the Max Supply Amount field of the Suppliers table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| SupplierCapacityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the Supplier capacity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| SupplierUtilization | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The capacity utilization of the Supplier for this period. Utilization is calculated as the total supplied quantity divided by the Supplier Capacity. | [Percentage] | [NEO] |
| SupplierRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Supplier. This is based on a weighted average of the Supplier's Concentration Risk, Utilization Risk, Geographic Risk and User Defined Risk. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the throughput concentration of the Supplier location. This is calculated based on the total Supplied Quantity of the Supplier relative to the total demanded quantity across all products for the period. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close to capacity the Supplier is during the model solve. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Supplier. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Optimization Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Suppliers table. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions from all supply activities at this Supplier. This is taken as the sum of all CO2 Emissions from the OptimizationSupplierSummary table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| TotalCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to CO2 Emissions for this Supplier. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Supplier. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Supplier. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO, DART] |

| ColumnName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the column where the error has been identified. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| ValidationRule | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the internal validation rule that the optimization engine found a problem in. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| ErrorType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The listed type of error associated with the validation rule. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| ErrorMessage | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | A description of the reported error. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| Severity | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The severity value of the identified error, this will be 0 to 3 with 3 being the most severe.  0 - Informational Errors  1 - Minor Errors  2 - Moderate Errors  3- Critical - Infeasible or Failed Model | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| IdentifiedValue | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The value that has been identified as the source of the error | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| Action | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | If corrective action was taken, the data adjustment performed by the solver will be listed here. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| ValueReplaced | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | If a value had to be replaced, the updated value will be listed here. | [NaN] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
| Count | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The number of times that the error occurred. | [Integer] | [NEO, TRIAD, HOPPER] |
