### シート: OptimizationWorkCenterSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| PeriodName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The time period that the results are reported for. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| WorkCenterName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the WorkCenter. | [NaN] | [NEO, DART] |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| InitialState | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The initial state of the Work Center. This is specified in the Initial State field of the Work Centers table and will be one of Existing or Potential | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| InitialStatus | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The Initial Status of the Work Center. This is specified in the Work Center Status field of the Work Centers table and will be one of Open, Closed or Consider. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| OptimizedStatus | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The status of the Work Center based on the optimization's results. This will be one of Open, Closed or Consider. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| TotalWorkCenterCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total cost associated with the Work Center. This will be reported as the sum of the Fixed Operating Cost, Fixed Startup Cost, Fixed Closing Cost and any associated Process Costs. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| OperatingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The fixed operating cost of the Work Center. This is specified in the Fixed Operating Cost field of the Work Centers table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| StartupCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The startup cost of the Work Center. If a Work Center opens in a period then the fixed startup cost will be applied. This is specified in the Fixed Startup Cost field of the Work Centers table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| ClosingCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The closing cost of the Work Center. If a Work Center closes in a period then the fixed closing cost will be applied. This is specified in the Fixed Closing Cost field of the Work Centers table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| TotalProcessCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The cost of any Processes that were run using this Work Center. This will be the sum of Unit Cost and Fixed Cost specified in the Processes table for any processes that were used at this Work Center. More detailed Process costs can be found in the Optimization Process Summary table. | [Cost] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total throughput quantity that the Work Center handled in the Period. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputQuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total throughput volume that the Work Center handled in the Period. | [Volume] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputVolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total throughput weight that the Work Center handled in the period. | [Weight] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputWeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The total throughput time that the Work Center handled in the Period. | [Time] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputTimeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that time is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputCapacity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The throughput capacity for the Work Center. This is specified in the Throughput Capacity field of the Work Centers table. | [Quantity] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputCapacityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that time is expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [NEO] |
| ThroughputUtilization | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The utilization of the Work Center for this period. Utilization is calculated as the Throughput divided by the Throughput Capacity. | [Percentage] | [NEO, DART] |
| UtilizationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with how close the Work Center was to its specified capacity. | [Risk] | [NEO, DART] |
| TotalCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions at this Work Center. | [Quantity] | [] |
| TotalCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 Emissions at this Work Center. | [Cost] | [] |
| FixedCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The fixed CO2 emissions at this Work Center. This is specified in the Fixed CO2 Emissions column of the Work Center table. | [Quantity] | [] |
| FixedCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The cost attributed to Fixed CO2 Emissions at this Work Center. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalProductionCO2Emissions | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total CO2 emissions attributed to production at this Work Center. | [Quantity] | [] |
| TotalProductionCO2Cost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to CO2 emissions of production at this Work Center. | [Cost] | [] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [NEO] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Facility. | [GeoCoordinate] | [NEO] |

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| CustomerName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Customer. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Product. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLines | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines that were placed for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesPrimarySourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were sourced from the primary location as specified in the Customer Fulfillment Policies . | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesNonPrimarySourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were sourced from a non-primary location as specified in the Customer Fulfillment Policies. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesMultiSourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were sourced from multiple locations. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were undelivered. This would include lines that were cancelled as well as lines that were in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesOnTimeInFull | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that had the complete ordered quantity delivered on time. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesLateInFull | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that had the complete ordered quantity delivered late. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesOnTimeInFullRate | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The rate of lines delivered on time and in full for the listed Customer / Product combination. This is calculated as PlacedLines On Time In Full divided by Placed Lines. | [Percentage] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesBackordered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were placed into backorder. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLinesCancelled | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines for the listed Customer / Product combination that were cancelled. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityPrimarySourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that was sourced from the primary location as specified in the Customer Fulfillment Policies. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityNonPrimarySourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that was sourced from a non-primary location as specified in the Customer Fulfillment Policies. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityMultiSourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that was sourced from multiple locations. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that was undelivered. This would include quantity that was cancelled as well as quantity that was in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityOnTimeInFull | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total delivered quantity across all lines that had the complete ordered quantity delivered on time for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityLateInFull | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total delivered quantity across all lines that had the complete ordered quantity delivered late for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityOnTimeInFullRate | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The rate of quantity delivered on time and in full for the listed Customer / Product combination. This is calculated as Placed Order Quantity On Time In Full divided by Placed Order Quantity. | [Percentage] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityBackordered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that were placed into backorder. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderQuantityCancelled | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination that was cancelled. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| PlacedOrderVolumeMultiSourced | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume for the listed Customer / Product combination that was sourced from multiple locations. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedOrderVolumeUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume for the listed Customer / Product combination that was undelivered. This would include volume that was cancelled as well as volume that was in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

This is calculated as Placed Order volume On Time In Full divided by Placed Order volume. | [Percentage] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Source Count Risk metric associated with this Product for the Customer/ Product combination. Source Count Risk is determined based on the number of unique sources that are used to satisfy the Customer Orders for the listed product. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Customer Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| ProductName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Product. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| TotalPlacedLines | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of lines that were placed for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedLinesDelivered | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of Lines placed for the listed Customer / Product combination that were delivered | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedLinesUndelivered | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of lines that were undelivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. This would include lines that were cancelled as well as lines that were in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantityDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity that was delivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantityUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered quantity that was undelivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. This would include quantity that was cancelled as well as quantity that was in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolumeDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume that was delivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolumeUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered volume that was undelivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. This would include volume that was cancelled as well as volume that was in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| VolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered weight for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeightDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered weight that was delivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeightUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total ordered weight that was undelivered for the listed Customer / Product combination. This would include weight that was cancelled as well as weight that was in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| WeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total revenue generated for the listed Customer / Product combination. This is calculated as the corresponding Product Unit Price * Total Delivered Quantity. | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalLostRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The revenue lost for the listed Customer / Product combination. This is calculated as the corresponding Product Unit Price * Total Placed Order Quantity Undelivered | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Concentration Risk score associated with this Customer / Product combination. Concentration Risk is based on what portion of the Customer's total ordered quantity the listed product represents. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Source Count Risk metric associated with this Product for the Customer/ Product combination. Source Count Risk is determined based on the number of unique sources that are used to satisfy the Customer Orders for the listed product. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Customer Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

### シート: SimulationCustomerRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| CustomerName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Customer. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| CustomerRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Customer. This is based on a weighted average of the Concentration Risk, Source Count Risk, Geographic Risk and the User Defined Risk of the Customer across the entire model horizon.  The Customer Risk Score is used to calculate the overall Risk Score in the Simulation Risk Metrics Summary table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated the with the demand concentration at the Customer location. This is reported as a weighted average over all Products based on the Concentration Risk in the Simulation Customer Product Summary table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Customer uses across all products. This is reported as a weighted average over all Products based on the Source Count Risk in the Simulation Customer Product Summary table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| PlacedOrders | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of orders that were placed by the listed Customer. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| PlacedOrdersCancelled | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of orders that were cancelled for the listed Customer. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| PlacedLines | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines that were placed for the listed Customer. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |

| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| CustomerName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Customer. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| TotalPlacedOrders | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of orders placed by this Customer. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrdersDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of orders that were delivered for the listed Customer. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrdersUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of orders that were undelivered for the listed Customer. This would include orders that were cancelled as well as orders that were in-transit at the time the simulation ended. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedLines | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of lines that were placed for the listed Customer / Product combination. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedLinesDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of Lines placed by this Customer that were delivered | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedLinesUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total number of Lines placed by this Customer that were undelivered | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantityDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The total delivered quantity across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| TotalPlacedOrderQuantityUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total undelivered quantity across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Quantity] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that quantity outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total volume across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolumeDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total delivered volume across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderVolumeUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total undelivered volume across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| VolumeUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that volume outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeight | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total weight across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeightDelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total delivered weight across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalPlacedOrderWeightUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total undelivered weight across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Weight] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| WeightUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that weight outputs are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total revenue generated for the listed Customer. This is calculated as the sum of all corresponding Product Unit Price * Total Delivered Quantity for the respective products. | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| TotalLostRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The revenue lost for the listed Customer. This is calculated as the sum of all corresponding Product Unit Price * Total Placed Order Quantity Undelivered for the respective products. | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| CustomerRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Score associated with this Customer. It is calculated as a weighted average of the Concentration, Source Count, Geographic and User Defined Risk. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Concentration Risk score associated with this Customer. Concentration Risk is based on what portion of the total ordered quantity across the entire model that the  Customer's total ordered quantity represents. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Source Count Risk metric associated with this Customer. Source Count Risk is determined based on the number of unique sources that are used to satisfy the Customer Orders across all products. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Customer Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| TotalPlacedOrderVolumeUndelivered | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The total undelivered volume across all products that were ordered by this Customer. | [Volume] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| TotalLostRevenue | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The revenue lost for the listed Customer. This is calculated as the sum of all corresponding Product Unit Price * Total Placed Order Quantity Undelivered for the respective products. | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| CustomerRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Score associated with this Customer. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Concentration Risk score associated with this Customer. Concentration Risk is based on what portion of the total ordered quantity across the entire model that the  Customer's total ordered quantity represents. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Source Count Risk metric associated with this Customer. Source Count Risk is determined based on the number of unique sources that are used to satisfy the Customer Orders across all products. This will contribute to the model's Customer Risk Score. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Customer. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Customer Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Customers table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Customer. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| QuotedTimeToFill | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The quoted time to fill as entered in the Inventory Policies table for the listed Facility / Product combination. This is the length of time from the point that an order enters the fulfillment queue at the Facility until it must be filled to be considered filled on time. | [Time] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| ReceivedLinesNonPrimarySource | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines received by the listed Facility / Product combination where the Facility was not listed as the primary source for the order as specified in either the Customer Fulfillment Policies or Replenishment Policies table. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| ReceivedLinesMissedPrimarySource | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | The number of lines rejected by the listed Facility / Product combination where the Facility was supposed to serve as the primary source as specified in either the Customer Fulfillment or Replenishment Policies table. | [Integer] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| FacilityName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the Facility. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| FacilityRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this Facility. This is based on a weighted average of the Facility's Concentration, Source Count, Geographic and User Defined risk across the simulation. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| ConcentrationRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the throughput concentration of the Facility. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SourceCountRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the number of sources that the Facility uses across all products. Less sources results in higher risk. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| GeographicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the geographic location of the Facility. This is a weighted average of several geographic components that are reported in greater detail in the Simulation Geographic Risk Metrics table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| UserDefinedRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the User Defined Risk value entered in the Facilities table. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

### シート: SimulationGeographicRiskMetrics

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| RiskRatingName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The Risk Rating that risk metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SiteName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the location that Geographic Risk Metrics are reported for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| SiteType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The type of site that the Geographic Risk Metrics are reported for. This will be one of Customer, Facility or Supplier. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO] |
| GeographicRiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with the geographic location of the site. This is a weighted average of Bio Lab Distance, Economic, Natural Disaster, Nuclear Distance, Political, Epidemic, and Labor Risks. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| BioLabDistanceRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the Site's proximity to a Level 4 Biolab. The closer the proximity, the higher the risk. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| EconomicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the economic characteristics of the Site's country.  This metric is using a combination of GDP and number of unique exporting products as reported by WorldBank. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| NaturalDisasterRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with potential economic devastation resulting from natural disasters that can impact the Site location. Considered natural disasters are droughts, floods, earthquakes, volcanic eruptions, landslides and cyclones. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| NuclearDistanceRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the Site's proximity to nuclear power plants. The closer the proximity, the higher the risk. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| PoliticalRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with the political stability of the Site's country. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| EpidemicRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with epidemic impacts on the Site's country. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| LaborRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with labor markets of the Site's country. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Latitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The latitude of the Site. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| Longitude | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The longitude of the Site. | [GeoCoordinate] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| StatType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | Simulations that were run for multiple replications will have outputs summarized into several statistics. The type of statistic being reported will be populated in this field. For a single replication simulation, the only Stat Type will be Mean. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| RiskScore | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk score associated with this scenario. This is calculated as the weighted average of the Customer Risk, Facility Risk, Supplier Risk and Network Risk. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| CustomerRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with Customers in this scenario. More details on the Risk components can be found in the Simulation Customer Summary and Simulation Customer Risk Metrics tables. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| FacilityRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with Facilities in this scenario. More details on the Risk components can be found in the Simulation Facility Summary and Simulation Facility Risk Metrics tables. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

| NetworkRisk | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The risk associated with Network activities in this scenario. More details on the Risk components can be found in the Simulation Network Risk Metrics and Simulation Product Risk Metrics tables. | [Risk] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |
| DARTVersion | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |  |  |  |  | The version of the DART solver that was used for the scenario run. | [NaN] | [THROG, DENDRO, DART] |

This will be the sum of the fixed route cost, the total distance cost of all segments of this route, the total time cost of the route, the total reposition distance cost of the route, the total stop cost of the route and the total unit cost of the route. | [Cost] | [THROG, DENDRO] |

| TerritoryName | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | A unique identifier for the territory the route is assigned to. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |  |

### シート: TransportationSummary

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| HopperVersion | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The version of the HOPPER solver that was used for the scenario run. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| RunStartTime | Timestamp |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The Date/Time when the scenario was run. Times are reported in UTC / Coordinated Universal Time. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalRunTime | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total time taken for the scenario run to complete. Total Run Time will be expressed in minutes. | [Time] | [HOPPER] |
| ResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The size of the solver resource that was selected to run the optimization. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| ConsumedMemory | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The amount of memory (GB) that was consumed during the optimization run. | [Quantity] | [HOPPER] |
| SuggestedResourceSize | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The smallest resource size required to successfully solve the model. Recommended based on the consumed memory. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| SolveType | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The type of solve that was run. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalTransportationCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total cost of the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalRouteFixedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total route fixed cost in the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalAssetFixedCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total asset fixed cost in the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDistanceCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total distance cost of the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalRepositionDistanceCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total reposition distance cost of the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalOutOfRouteDistanceCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total out of route distance cost of the scenario. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalTimeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to time. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalWaitTimeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to wait time. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalRestTimeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total rest time cost. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalBreakTimeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total short break time cost. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalDutyTimeCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total duty time cost. This is the additive cost for duty time specified in the Duty Time Cost field of the Transportation Rates table. | [Cost] | [] |
| TotalStopCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to the number of stops. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalUnitCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total unit cost. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDirectCost | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total cost attributed to direct shipment cost. | [Cost] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDeliveredQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of product that was served by a route in the scenario run. | [Quantity] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDirectQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of product that was served with the direct option in the scenario run. | [Quantity] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalUndeliveredQuantity | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total quantity of product that went unserved in this scenario run. | [Quantity] | [HOPPER] |
| QuantityUOM | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The unit of measure that the quantities are expressed in terms of. | [NaN] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDeliveredVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of product that was served ny a route in the scenario run. | [Volume] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalDirectVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of product that was served with the direct option in the scenario run. | [Volume] | [HOPPER] |
| TotalUndeliveredVolume | double |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The total volume of product that went unserved in this scenario run. | [Volume] | [HOPPER] |

### シート: TransportationValidationErrorR0

| Column Name | Data Type | Validation Type | Required | RequiredIf | PK | Master Table | Expandable | Technology | AllowableUOMTypes | Relates to keys | Default value | Notes | Explanation | PrecisionCategory | BasicMode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ScenarioName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the scenario the results are saved for. | [NaN] | [] |

| ColumnName | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the column where the error has been identified. | [NaN] | [] |
| ValidationRule | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The name of the internal validation rule that the optimization engine found a problem in. | [NaN] | [] |
| ErrorType | String |  |  |  | Yes |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The listed type of error associated with the validation rule. | [NaN] | [] |
| ErrorMessage | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | A description of the reported error. | [NaN] | [] |
| Severity | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The severity value of the identified error, this will be 0 to 3 with 3 being the most severe.  0 - Informational Errors  1 - Minor Errors  2 - Moderate Errors  3- Critical - Infeasible or Failed Model | [NaN] | [] |
| IdentifiedValue | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The value that has been identified as the source of the error | [NaN] | [] |
| Action | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | If corrective action was taken, the data adjustment performed by the solver will be listed here. | [NaN] | [] |
| ValueReplaced | String |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | If a value had to be replaced, the updated value will be listed here. | [NaN] | [] |
| Count | int |  |  |  |  |  |  | [HOPPER] |  |  |  |  | The number of times that the error occurred. | [Integer] | [] |
